sizing_rule.note: Use symmetric standard deviation ranges (Mean ± N sigmas, where N is identical on both sides) when constructing the parametric distribution for optimal f calculations. Example: ±3 sigma range, not asymmetric ranges like ±2 or ±4.

source_rule_text: Use symmetric standard deviation ranges (same number of sigmas left and right of mean) when determining the parametric distribution for position sizing calculations.
